meta.summary: TAFFISH first-party R/Seurat helper runtime for matrix-level scRNA-seq import, QC, filtering, Seurat analysis, marker ranking, candidate annotation, tables, plots, and RDS handoff.
meta.description: TAFFISH first-party R/Seurat helper runtime for matrix-level scRNA-seq import, QC, filtering, Seurat analysis, marker ranking, candidate annotation, tables, plots, and RDS handoff.

test: scrnaseq-r-versions --tsv | grep -F 'scrnaseq-r' | grep -F '0.1.0' >/dev/null && scrnaseq-r-versions --tsv | grep -F 'Seurat' | grep -F '5.5.0' >/dev/null && Rscript -e 'pkgs <- c("Seurat","SeuratObject","Matrix","data.table","jsonlite","ggplot2","patchwork","cowplot","pheatmap","hdf5r","SingleCellExperiment","glmGamPoi","MAST","harmony"); missing <- pkgs[!vapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, logical(1), quietly=TRUE)]; if (length(missing)) stop(paste("missing", paste(missing, collapse=",")))' && scrnaseq-r-import --help | grep -F 'Import 10x matrix' >/dev/null && scrnaseq-r-analysis --help | grep -F 'sctransform' >/dev/null && scrnaseq-r-marker --help | grep -F 'MAST' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-scrnaseq-r-workflow-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; Rscript /opt/scrnaseq-r/share/testdata/scrnaseq_r_smoke.R "$tmp" && test -s "$tmp/import/seurat.raw.rds" && test -s "$tmp/qc/plots/qc_violin.png" && test -s "$tmp/filter/seurat.filtered.rds" && test -s "$tmp/analysis/tables/clusters.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/analysis/plots/umap_by_cluster.png" && test -s "$tmp/marker/markers/cluster_markers.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/annotation/annotation/cluster_annotation.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/summary/tables/seurat_summary.tsv" && rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: TAFFISH scrnaseq-r runtime
upstream.citation: Hao et al. Dictionary learning for integrative, multimodal and scalable single-cell analysis. Nature Biotechnology (2023) [Seurat v5].
